'''''Star Wars Special Edition'' 1984''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom that collected the Marvel adaptations of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].

The stories were first published in the UK in [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 118|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 118]]-[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 135|''135'']] and [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 1|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 1]]-''[[Return of the Jedi Weekly 8|8]]''
